---
title: "Chris Manning on Building Neural Network Models That Can Reason"
description: "Chris Manning's MSR talk on building NN models for reasoning."
author: "synesis"
date: "2019-08-03"
categories: [NLP, deep learning, reasoning, talk, video]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Chris Manning at MSR. [Watch on YouTube](https://youtu.be/-2JRiv3Mycs)](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Chris Manning's talk @ MSR on building NN models for reasoning, July 2019.


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_building-neural-network-models-that-can-reason-activity-6563514205801197568-L8b1).*
